resources.emptyHint: Use the "Manage people" button at the top right to add the first resource.
resources.name: Name
resources.confirmDeleteWithAssignments:
Delete "{name}" and {count} related assignments?
(Cannot be undone)
resources.createFailed: Failed to add the person. Please try again.

projects.name: Project name
projects.confirmDeleteWithAssignments:
Delete "{name}" and {count} related assignments?
(Cannot be undone)

assignments.description: Assign a person to a project for a date range
assignments.emptyHint: Use "+ Add assignment" at the top right to create one.
assignments.requirePeopleAndProjects: Register at least one person and one project to create assignments
assignments.noMatches: No assignments match the current filters

signin.title: Sign in
signin.description: Enter your work email. We will send you a sign-in link by email.
signin.hint: Only email addresses on the allowed domain can sign in.
signin.checkEmailDescription: We sent a sign-in link to your email. Click the link to complete sign-in.
signin.checkEmailFootnote: If the email does not arrive, check your spam folder. The link expires in 24 hours.
signin.errorAccessDenied: This address cannot sign in. The domain may not be allowed, or the address may have been suppressed due to a previous bounce or spam report.
signin.errorSuppressed: This email address has been suppressed due to a previous delivery failure or spam report. Please contact your administrator if you believe this is in error.
signin.errorVerification: The link is invalid or expired. Please send a new sign-in link.
signin.errorConfiguration: There is a problem with the auth configuration. Please contact the administrator.
signin.errorDefault: Sign-in failed. Please try again later.

errorPage.hint401: Sign-in is required. Enter your email on the sign-in page.
errorPage.hint403: This action is not permitted. Check your permissions for the signed-in user.
errorPage.hint404: The requested URL does not exist.
errorPage.hint5xx: A server-side error occurred. Please try again later.

errors.endBeforeStart: End date must be on or after the start date
errors.invalidUrl: {field} must be an http or https URL
